title: Perfect Day
description: One rich page of your imagined day on Yas Island — its story, the places, and the pictures, in order.
whenToUse: Build my perfect day or evening on Yas Island — a romantic evening, a family day, a plan for tonight — told as one rich page that grows as we talk. Not for answering a single question, not for showing one item on its own, and not for step-by-step guided choices.
